sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_time DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, now()), (2, now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR), (3, now() - INTERVAL 2 HOUR);
UPDATE test_dates SET event_time = date_trunc('minute', event_time) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_time, date_trunc('day', event_time) AS truncated_day FROM test_dates;
SELECT id, date_trunc('month', event_time, 'UTC') AS truncated_month FROM test_dates WHERE event_time > now() - INTERVAL 1 MONTH;
